en: Hand it over. Give me the phone.
Okay. Okay.
The bag, too. Come on!
All right. Now, uh, get down on the ground. Face down.
ko: 좋아. 이제, 땅에 엎드려. 얼굴을 아래로.

en: Come on!
Oh, no. You don't understand. This is an Alaia.
ko: 안 돼. 이해 못 해? 이건 알라이아야.

en: An Awada?
It's like a totally important designer.
Then I will totally shoot you in the head.
Get out!
Good. Good. Yeah.
All right. Um, count to 100. Thank you.
One...
The evening had turned into a royal mess.
Sexually harassed, robbed.
I didn't know the number of the party, so I couldn't call Dion,
ko: 파티 번호를 몰라서 디온에게 전화할 수 없었고,

en: and Daddy would kill me if he knew where I was.
ko: 아빠가 내가 어디 있는지 알면 나를 죽일 거야.

en: There was just one person left to call,
and I really, really didn't want to call him.
ko: 정말, 정말 그에게 전화하고 싶지 않았어.

en: Come on.
